pages.text: $(thing)Flue curing$() uses controlled indoor heat instead of direct smoke. Requirements:$(br2)- No direct sky access$(br)- A roof overhead$(br)- Clear air above the rack$(br)- A nearby lit $(item)Flue Firebox$()$(br)- No smoke contamination nearby
Flue curing takes about $(item)1.5 Minecraft days$(). It is faster than air curing and cleaner than fire curing.
A proper flue-curing barn gives good control over the result and keeps leaf out of open weather.
